chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 328 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنِ اِتَّخَذَ شَعْراً فَلَمْ يَفْرُقْهُ فَرَقَهُ اَللَّهُ بِمِنْشَارٍ مِنْ نَارٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.328 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever grows their hair and does not part it, Allah (swt) will part it with a saw of fire."
